prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 luxury-campaign poster for a fictional crossover product, a disruptive co-branded handbag advertisement between {argument name="brand one" default="HERMÈS PARIS"} and {argument name="brand two" default="拼多多"}. The composition is a violently split, collage-style fashion key visual with a torn-paper seam running vertically down the center, dividing two clashing aesthetics: on the left, refined premium luxury branding in warm Hermes orange, cream paper, and elegant editorial minimalism; on the right, aggressive Chinese e-commerce promotion energy in black and metallic red foil, with loud sale graphics, confetti, ripped stickers, and explosive discount typography. At the top center, place both brands prominently with a large collaboration headline in Chinese, the left logo area styled like a classic luxury house with serif typography and horse-and-carriage emblem, the right logo area in bold red Chinese branding. Below that, add the main headline text in huge Chinese characters: {argument name="headline text" default="颠覆性联名款"}, and a boxed subheadline: {argument name="subheadline text" default="百亿补贴铂金包"}. The centerpiece is one Birkin-style luxury handbag shown front-facing and large, perfectly centered but visually split in half along the torn seam: the left half is orange pebbled leather with gold hardware, the right half is crinkled metallic silver leather with silver hardware, both halves seamlessly merged into one surreal bag. The bag should include 5 clearly visible accessory/product elements around or on it: 1 orange clochette hanging on the left, 1 metallic silver hanging strap with lock on the right, 1 central turn-lock closure with padlock, 1 orange Hermes-style gift box with dark ribbon at lower left, and 1 beige dust bag with small logo near the bottom left. Behind the bag on the left is a painterly orange brushstroke on textured cream paper; behind the bag on the right is a crushed reflective red metallic wrapper surface with spark-like highlights and falling confetti. On the right half, add 8 aggressive promotional text bursts and stickers layered diagonally like an online shopping festival poster: 1 giant white Chinese slogan "百亿补贴 全网最低", 2 "限时秒杀!!", 3 a torn price sticker reading "补贴价 ¥999?!", 4 "万件疯抢", 5 "百亿补贴 官方直补", 6 "直降到底", 7 a large bottom torn banner repeating "补贴价 ¥999?!", and 8 small text "建议零售价 ¥1000000+". On the left margin, add a slim vertical editorial text column with 4 grouped text blocks in a luxury layout: 1 "限量发售 / 全球瞩目 / 2024 LIMITED EDITION", 2 "HERMÈS PARIS MADE IN FRANCE", 3 "CRAFTED FOR ELEGANCE", and 4 "DESIGNED TO DEFY THE ORDINARY". At the bottom, create a black app-like information bar with 3 feature blocks from left to right: 1 a red brand icon with "拼多多" and a search-bar style pill containing "百亿补贴铂金包", 2 a lightning icon with the text "百亿补贴 官方补贴 所以低价", and 3 a shield icon with the text "正品保障 假一赔十 3期免息". Add a thin final slogan line across the very bottom in small Chinese text. Use hyper-detailed commercial product photography, premium graphic design, sharp lighting, embossed textures, foil reflections, paper tears, and strong depth. The overall mood must feel like a world-class art director forced a heritage luxury campaign and a chaotic discount-shopping poster to collide in one image, producing extreme visual tension, irony, and high-impact contrast.
translatedPrompt: 创建一个 9:16 的竖版奢华营销海报，用于展示一款虚构的跨界产品，即 {argument name="brand one" default="HERMÈS PARIS"} 与 {argument name="brand two" default="拼多多"} 之间极具颠覆性的联名手袋广告。构图采用强烈的对撞拼贴风格，画面中央有一道垂直贯穿的撕纸裂缝，将两种冲突的美学一分为二：左侧为精致的高端奢华品牌风格，采用爱马仕橙、奶油色纸张及优雅的编辑式极简主义；右侧为充满侵略性的中国电商促销风格，以黑色和金属红箔为基调，配以醒目的促销图形、五彩纸屑、撕裂的贴纸以及极具爆发力的折扣字体。在顶部中央，显著放置两个品牌，并配以醒目的中文联名大标题；左侧标志区呈现经典奢侈品牌风格，使用衬线字体和马车徽标，右侧标志区则采用醒目的红色中式品牌风格。下方添加巨大的中文主标题：{argument name="headline text" default="颠覆性联名款"}，以及一个带边框的副标题：{argument name="subheadline text" default="百亿补贴铂金包"}。画面中心是一只 Birkin 风格的奢华手袋，正面朝向且尺寸巨大，完美居中但被画面中央的撕裂缝一分为二：左半部分为橙色荔枝纹皮革配金色五金，右半部分为褶皱金属银色皮革配银色五金，两半无缝融合为一只超现实主义手袋。手袋周围或上方应包含 5 个清晰可见的配饰/产品元素：左侧悬挂 1 个橙色钥匙扣，右侧悬挂 1 个带锁的金属银色挂带，1 个中央旋转锁扣及挂锁，左下角放置 1 个带深色丝带的橙色爱马仕风格礼盒，以及左下角附近 1 个带有小徽标的米色防尘袋。手袋左后方是纹理奶油纸上的油画感橙色笔触；手袋右后方是带有火花般高光和飘落纸屑的压碎感红色金属包装纸表面。在右半部分，添加 8 个充满侵略性的促销文字爆点和贴纸，像购物节海报一样呈对角线层叠排列：1 个巨大的白色中文标语“百亿补贴 全网最低”，2 个“限时秒杀!!”，3 个写着“补贴价 ¥999?!”的撕裂价格贴纸，4 个“万件疯抢”，5 个“百亿补贴 官方直补”，6 个“直降到底”，7 个底部重复“补贴价 ¥999?!”的大型撕裂横幅，以及 8 个小字“建议零售价 ¥1000000+”。在左侧边缘，添加一列纤细的垂直编辑式文字，包含 4 个分组文本块，采用奢华布局：1 “限量发售 / 全球瞩目 / 2024 LIMITED EDITION”，2 “HERMÈS PARIS MADE IN FRANCE”，3 “CRAFTED FOR ELEGANCE”，4 “DESIGNED TO DEFY THE ORDINARY”。底部创建一个黑色的 App 风格信息栏，从左至右包含 3 个功能块：1 个带有“拼多多”字样的红色品牌图标，以及一个包含“百亿补贴铂金包”的搜索栏式胶囊按钮，2 个带有闪电图标及“百亿补贴 官方补贴 所以低价”文字的区域，3 个带有盾牌图标及“正品保障 假一赔十 3期免息”文字的区域。在最底部添加一行细小的中文最终标语。使用超精细的商业产品摄影、高级平面设计、锐利的灯光、压印纹理、箔片反光、纸张撕裂效果和强烈的景深。整体氛围必须如同顶级艺术总监强行将传统奢华广告与混乱的折扣促销海报融合在一起，产生极端的视觉张力、讽刺感和高冲击力的对比。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华 x 电商风格对撞海报：此提示词旨在生成一张极具视觉冲击力的竖版营销海报，将奢华时尚品牌与混乱的折扣平台促销风格进行碰撞，打造极具挑衅意味的联名产品广告。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, front-facing, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
